case_title: JUANA RAQUEL GUILLEN VS. JIM WHELLY

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY GUILLEN, JUANA RAQUEL WHELLY, JIM
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-30-2013 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUILLEN, JUANA RAQUEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WHELLY, JIM STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-25-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WHELLY, JIM
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY GUILLEN, JUANA RAQUEL AS TO DEFENDANT WHELLY, JIM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-30-2013 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUILLEN, JUANA RAQUEL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-30-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-30-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JOYCELYN PEREZ-CCSF. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
